name: beui-cylinder-carousel
title: Cylinder Carousel
author: Saurabh Chauhan
description: Rolls caller-provided items around a responsive concave or convex cylindrical projection.

changes: Changed the project utility alias to its bundled relative import.
Added an accessible carousel name and live item position, replaced application role with group, and mapped arrow navigation for RTL.
Stopped active glide controls and cleared the pending wheel timer during unmount.
Guarded pointer capture when synthetic accessibility input has no active pointer.
Normalized the malformed indentation around the upstream return block.

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import and tightened semantics, RTL keys, pointer capture, cleanup, and formatting.
modifications.reason: Install portably without leaking animation work and expose the custom interaction without application-mode semantics.
